cards.text: What year was the first Super Bowl played?
Name 3 countries in South America in 10 seconds
What planet is known as the Red Planet?
How many bones are in the adult human body?
What is the capital of Australia?
Do your best celebrity impression for 15 seconds
Sing the chorus of any song right now
Talk in an accent for the next 2 rounds
Do 10 pushups right now
Let the group pick a song — you have to dance to it for 20 seconds
Everyone who has traveled to another continent — drink!
Point to the person most likely to survive a zombie apocalypse
Everyone who has been skydiving — drink!
The last person to raise their hand takes a drink
Everyone born in the summer — drink!
Swap seats with someone at another table
The host picks someone — they must tell an embarrassing story
Rock Paper Scissors tournament — loser drinks
Everyone puts their phone in the middle. First to grab theirs drinks
Group photo time! Strike a pose!
Arm wrestling match — the two team captains face off!
Staring contest — first to blink loses
Who can hold their breath the longest?
Thumb war! Best of 3 wins
Each team picks a champion — trivia speed round!
Pineapple on pizza — yes or no? Majority rules, losers drink
Is a hot dog a sandwich? Debate for 30 seconds
What is the most overrated movie of all time?
Would you rather fight 100 duck-sized horses or 1 horse-sized duck?
What is the worst pizza topping? Group must agree
